title: How to Approve Requests (Deans & Chairs)
content:
How to Approve Requests - Guide for Deans and Chairpersons
Morgan State University - Office of the Registrar

This guide is for FACULTY AND STAFF use (Deans and Chairpersons). It explains how to review, approve, correct, or decline student requests in Smartsheet.

---

STEP 1: LOG IN
Log in to Smartsheet using your MSU credentials.

---

STEP 2: ACCESS YOUR DASHBOARD
Start with your department or school dashboard (look for the green pie-circle icon). Star it as a favorite for quick access in the future.

---

STEP 3: FAMILIARIZE YOURSELF WITH THE DASHBOARD
The top of the dashboard shows important links and a registrar dates/deadlines calendar. Review these to stay aware of current deadlines.

---

STEP 4: GO TO YOUR APPROVAL SHEET
Request types are listed alphabetically on the dashboard. The number of requests waiting for your approval is shown next to each type. Click on the request type box to go to the approvals sheet. The Dynamic View located after the request type box shows all request statuses.

---

STEP 5: REVIEW THE DATA
The approval sheet columns include:
- Primary
- Last Name
- First Name
- Request Date
- Current Catalog
- Proposed Catalog

---

STEP 6: VIEW ATTACHMENTS
Attachments are located to the left of each row. You can view existing attachments and add new ones (for example, a Degreeworks Audit PDF).

---

STEP 7: VIEW AND ADD COMMENTS
Comments are located to the left of each row. PRIVACY NOTE: Only faculty and staff with access to the sheet can see these comments.

---

STEP 8: UNDERSTAND REQUEST DATES AND SLA
The Request Date shows the last day the student submitted the request. Most forms have a 10-day Service Level Agreement (SLA). A row turns RED if the request is overdue past the SLA.

---

APPROVE, CORRECT, OR DECLINE

Yes (APPROVE): Approves the request and sends it to the next approver in the workflow.

Hold (CORRECT): Sends the request back to the student to make corrections. The student will receive a notification.

No (DECLINE): Cancels the request permanently. This action cannot be undone.

IMPORTANT: When selecting Hold or No, add a comment in the column named with your role (e.g., "REASON") explaining why the request was held or declined.

For the full official guide with screenshots, view: [Approve Submission Guide](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1fWJRukqtKxU_hHQBJS6uA7l4O7wYJkg5/view)
